entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 22
entries.excerpt: Again “God tested Abraham, and said to him: …Take thy son… and go into the land of Moriah, and offer him there… for a burnt offering upon one of the mountains which I shall tell thee of” (Gen 22:1–2). So that it should not be said that Abraham was in a frenzy, the fulfillment is delayed three days. “And Abraham rose up… in the morning… and clave the wood… and took with him two young men and Isaac… and went” (Gen 22:3).…
